# dashboard-profile-menu â€” Phase 1 audit

## Files changed

- `src/components/dashboard/AppSidebar.tsx` â€” profile row â†’ account-menu popover trigger; gear folded in.
- `src/app/layout.tsx` â€” removed dead `UserButton` from the `@clerk/nextjs` import.

*(No other source files touched. `next-env.d.ts` was auto-regenerated by `npm run build` â€” a
Next artifact, not a hand edit, and gitignored.)*

## `src/components/dashboard/AppSidebar.tsx`

- **Imports added:** `useState` (react); `useRouter` added to the existing `next/navigation`
  import (alongside `usePathname`); `useClerk` from `@clerk/nextjs`; `Coming` from
  `@/components/ui/coming`; `Popover`, `PopoverTrigger`, `AppPopoverMenu`, `AppPopoverItem`,
  `AppPopoverSeparator` from `@/components/ui/popover`.
  - **App-popover primitive import path used:** `@/components/ui/popover` (same module
    `GlobalAppHeader.tsx` imports from â€” confirmed at implement time).
- **Module const added:** `COMING_ROW` (`'w-full gap-2.5 rounded-app-badge px-2.5 py-[7px]
  text-[13px] font-medium'`) â€” copied verbatim from `GlobalAppHeader.tsx:63` so the greyed
  Appearance row wears `AppPopoverItem` geometry via `<Coming>`.
- **Component state added:** `router`, `signOut` (from `useClerk()`), `accountMenuOpen`,
  `isSigningOut`.
- **Trigger:** the whole user-card (avatar `<img>` block + its eslint-disable comment + name/email
  block, all UNCHANGED) is now one `<button type="button" aria-label="Account menu">` inside
  `PopoverTrigger asChild` under a controlled `<Popover open={accountMenuOpen}
  onOpenChange={setAccountMenuOpen}>`. Row geometry kept (`flex items-center gap-2.5 px-2 py-1`),
  added `w-full text-left rounded-md hover:bg-app-hairline transition-colors`. A static
  `expand_more` chevron `AppIcon` sits on the right.
- **Deleted:** the standalone settings-gear `Link` (old :199-205) and its `R7` inline comment.
  The `Settings` action folds into the popover.
- **Popover content:** `AppPopoverMenu side="top" align="start" sideOffset={8} width={224}` with, in
  order: Settings (`router.push('/dashboard/settings')`) Â· Billing (`router.push('/dashboard/billing')`)
  Â· Appearance (greyed `<Coming what="appearance settings">`, inert) Â· `AppPopoverSeparator` Â· Log out
  (`destructive`, `signOut({ redirectUrl: '/sign-in' })`, guarded by `isSigningOut` fire-and-forget).
  Both wired rows close the menu (`setAccountMenuOpen(false)`) before navigating.
- **a11y:** exactly ONE `Popover` root; content only via the primitive's built-in Radix portal; no
  conditional second mount.
- **Tokens:** everything added uses `app-*` tokens only (`hover:bg-app-hairline`, `text-app-faint`,
  `rounded-app-badge`, etc.). The pre-existing raw hexes on `<aside>` (:91) were left untouched.
  `SidebarProfile` type and `dashboard/layout.tsx` prop plumbing unchanged.
- **Header comment (:11-26):** left as-is â€” it references R12/R15 (Domains) and the plan widget, not
  the deleted R7 gear, so no update was warranted. The R7 note that DID reference the gear was the
  inline comment at the deleted `Link`, which is gone.

## `src/app/layout.tsx`

- Removed only `UserButton` from the `@clerk/nextjs` named-import list (:31). No other change; the
  remaining `UserButton` mention in the file is a comment, not a usage (grep-confirmed) â€” lint stayed
  green, proving nothing depended on the import.

## AppIcon glyph names used

- **Proven-present** (already render as glyphs in live app-chrome â€” `GlobalAppHeader.tsx` /
  existing `AppSidebar.tsx`): `expand_more` (chevron), `settings`, `credit_card`.
- **Manifest-listed, not independently verified in the subset woff2** (`icons.txt` documents these
  but is called out as unreliable in both directions): `palette` (Appearance, greyed row) and
  `logout` (Log out). Both are common core Material Symbols and are in
  `public/fonts/material-symbols-rounded/icons.txt`. Could not verify against the compressed
  (Brotli) woff2 â€” a raw byte scan returns false even for known-present names, so it is inconclusive
  here. Chose to include them (not omit) for visual consistency; the P0 founder logout click-test
  human gate + visual merge gate will confirm they render as glyphs, not literal text. If either
  ships as text, swap to a proven-present name (this is a one-line fix and out of automated reach).
- **Omitted:** none.

## Deviations from plan

- **Chevron:** used `expand_more` (static, proven-present) rather than an open-state flip. The plan
  explicitly allows a static chevron; `expand_more` is the same glyph `GlobalAppHeader` uses for its
  dropdown triggers, so it is the safest choice. (Answers unresolved-question #1: static is fine.)
- **`logout` / `palette` glyphs unverified** â€” see above. Conservative-but-consistent call, logged
  for the human gate.

## Verification (all four gates)

| Gate | Result |
|------|--------|
| `npx tsc --noEmit` | **PASS** (exit 0) â€” see note below |
| `npm run lint` | **PASS** (exit 0; only pre-existing `no-img-element` / exhaustive-deps warnings in template files, none in touched files) |
| `npm run test:run` | **PASS** â€” 243 files, 4064 tests passed, 18 skipped |
| `npm run build` | **PASS** (exit 0) |

**tsc note:** the first `tsc` run failed with a single `TS2307` for
`@/assets/images/founder.jpg` in `src/app/page.tsx` (NOT a touched file). Root cause: a fresh
worktree with no generated `next-env.d.ts` (which supplies image-module type declarations). Running
`npm run build` regenerated `next-env.d.ts`; the re-run of `tsc --noEmit` was clean (exit 0). This
is the known fresh-worktree/stale-types condition, unrelated to this phase's changes.

## Open risks

- `logout` / `palette` glyph presence in the shipped subset font is unverified (see above) â€” must be
  eyeballed at the P0 human gate.
- No automated e2e for the popover (deliberate, per plan Â§E2E: a real logout click would destroy the
  shared authed Playwright session). Coverage is the 4-gate batch + the P0 founder logout click-test
  + the manual a11y checklist.

---

## Impl-review (standard tier, whole-diff) â€” VERDICT: ship

- All 10 acceptance criteria verified; scope = only the 2 allowed files; frozen foundation untouched; single Popover root (no double-mount); app-* tokens only; `UserButton` removal import-only.
- Green gate re-run independently by reviewer: tsc 0, lint 0, test:run 4064 passed/18 skipped, build 0.
- Non-blocking: (1) `logout` glyph unverified in shipped subset font â†’ covered by P0 founder logout click-test, one-line swap if it renders as text; (2) trigger uses `rounded-md` (plan-sanctioned) â†’ visual merge gate.
